title: Senior Fleet Manager at Jet Freight Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Jet Freight Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
